---
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
---

# Sections {.unnumbered}

### [Part I: General Overview, Physics & Ecology](user_guides/quarto_site/part1/index.qmd)

Model setup, physical processes, and biological processes.

### [Part II: Socio-Economics](user_guides/quarto_site/part2/index.qmd)

Fisheries, management, economics, and other industries.

**Authors:** Asta Audzijonyte, Rebecca Gorton, Isaac Kaplan, Jacob M. Kasper, Elizabeth A. Fulton

**Original Date:** April 2017

![](user_guides/quarto_site/part1/media/image1.jpg){width=1.87in height=1.87in fig-align="center"}


- **[The source code](https://github.com/Atlantis-Ecosystem-Model/AtlantisTrunk)** - You'll need permissions to access the Atlantis source code repository. 
- **[atlantistools](https://github.com/Atlantis-Ecosystem-Model/atlantistools)** - An R package to aid in processing and visualizing output from the Atlantis model
- **[shinyrAtlantis](https://github.com/Atlantis-Ecosystem-Model/shinyrAtlantis)** - A shiny app (in R) to aid in exploration of parameter files used in the Atlantis model
- **[atlantisom](https://github.com/r4atlantis/atlantisom)** - An R package to aid generating sampled data from the Atlantis model
